# SkillsMP Search

SkillsMP Search is an Agent Skill that finds and compares public skills by reading their source instructions. It supports a normal search and an explicit heavy mode.

## Start here

- `README.md`: purpose, installation, examples, limits, and compatibility
- `SKILL.md`: complete agent workflow and scoring rubric
- `examples/standard-search.md`: normal search shape
- `examples/heavy-search.md`: maximum-depth search shape
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: development and contribution workflow

## Runtime

Node.js 18 or newer. The search CLI uses no third-party runtime packages.
